description_long: This object is a high-end custom desktop computer with a transparent side panel, revealing intricate internal components and a liquid cooling system with blue coolant tubes. The front features three large cooling fans arranged vertically, and the interior showcases a powerful graphics card, motherboard, and cable management with blue accents. The chassis is constructed from black metal with glass or acrylic panels, supported by sturdy feet for stability. The rear panel is solid with ventilation grilles, while the side panels are clear, allowing a full view of the internal hardware. The overall design is sleek and modern, emphasizing both performance and aesthetics. This type of computer is typically used for gaming, content creation, or other demanding computing tasks.
description: A high-end custom desktop computer with a transparent side panel, visible liquid cooling, and blue-accented internal components. The design is sleek, modern, and built for performance.
description_view_0: The front view displays the transparent panel, three large blue cooling fans, visible liquid cooling tubes, and internal hardware components.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the clear panel, the depth of the chassis, and a partial view of the internal components and cooling system.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a solid black panel with ventilation grilles and mounting holes, concealing the internal components.
description_view_3: The right side view features another clear panel, offering a different angle of the internal hardware and cable management.
